title: What's In My Crate (WIMC)
description: Preview tooltip for Immersive Engineering crates.
body:
## What's In My Crate 

This client-side mod lets you preview the contents of an immersive engineering crate or reinforced crate by opening a preview window of the contents when hovering over it in your inventory. Currently there are no options to configure and the preview window is always active when hovering over a crate.

![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/PDnAb4L.png)
